title: Only 5 Percent of Marketers Have Seen Significant Gains with AI | On Scope | Podcast Clips | Video Shorts | All MKC Content | ANA
text:
Only 5 Percent of Marketers Have Seen Significant Gains with AI | On Scope
November 22, 2025
On Scope host Mike Berberich and show producer Ryan Dinger discuss new Gartner research that indicates only 5 percent of marketers are realizing significant gains on business outcomes with their generative AI efforts, speculating that the technology’s promise of complete industry overhaul might be a tad overblown.
